meta.summary: Haplotype-based Bayesian variant caller for SNPs, indels, MNPs, and complex small variants from BAM or CRAM alignments.
meta.description: Haplotype-based Bayesian variant caller for SNPs, indels, MNPs, and complex small variants from BAM or CRAM alignments.

test: mkdir -p /tmp/taf-freebayes-regions && cd /tmp/taf-freebayes-regions && printf 'chr1\t25\t6\t25\t26\n' > ref.fa.fai && fasta_generate_regions.py ref.fa.fai 10 | grep -F 'chr1:0-10' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-freebayes-call && cd /tmp/taf-freebayes-call && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:20
@RG	ID:rg1	SM:sample1
read1	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read2	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam > reads.bam && samtools index reads.bam && freebayes -f ref.fa --min-alternate-count 1 --min-alternate-fraction 0 reads.bam > calls.vcf && test -s calls.vcf && grep -F '#CHROM' calls.vcf >/dev/null && grep -F 'chr1' calls.vcf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-freebayes-leftalign && cd /tmp/taf-freebayes-leftalign && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:20
read1	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam | bamleftalign -f ref.fa -c > left.bam && samtools view left.bam | grep -F 'read1' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-freebayes-parallel && cd /tmp/taf-freebayes-parallel && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:20
@RG	ID:rg1	SM:sample1
read1	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read2	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam > reads.bam && samtools index reads.bam && printf 'chr1:0-20
' > regions.txt && freebayes-parallel regions.txt 1 -f ref.fa --min-alternate-count 1 --min-alternate-fraction 0 reads.bam > parallel.vcf && test -s parallel.vcf && grep -F '#CHROM' parallel.vcf >/dev/null && grep -F 'chr1' parallel.vcf >/dev/null
